description_long: This is an irregularly shaped, medium-sized stone with a predominantly light beige coloration, accented by brown and tan veining that runs diagonally and horizontally across its surface. The stone has a rough, natural texture with visible cracks and fissures, suggesting it has been weathered over time. One side features darker, more concentrated brown patches, while another side displays hand-written markings in black and blue ink, possibly for identification or cataloging purposes. The edges are jagged and uneven, with some areas appearing more angular and others more rounded. The surface finish is matte and non-reflective, with a tactile hardness typical of sedimentary or metamorphic rock. This stone would be commonly found in urban parks, gardens, or as part of landscaping features, serving as a natural obstacle or decorative element.
description: An irregular, beige stone with brown veining, rough texture, and visible cracks, featuring some hand-written markings on one side.
description_view_0: A broad, flat face with prominent brown veining and a light beige base, showing the largest surface area.
description_view_1: A more angular, upright view highlighting the stone's jagged edges and subtle brown streaks.
description_view_2: A side view with a darker brown patch and visible cracks, showing the stone's thickness and layered structure.
description_view_3: A narrower end with visible blue and black hand-written markings, emphasizing the stone's irregularity and roughness.
attribute_placement: set as a standalone feature or natural obstacle on the ground
attribute_pattern: Irregular brown and tan veining with some linear cracks and hand-written markings; the pattern is natural and non-repetitive.
attribute_weathering: Cracked and slightly eroded, with a rough, matte surface indicating moderate exposure to the elements.
attribute_integration_with_surroundings: Contrasts moderately with manicured lawns or paved surfaces, but can blend with other natural stones or vegetation in landscaped areas.

license_info.creator_display_name: UQ School of Earth and Environmental Sciences
